programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jules Hudson helps a recently retired couple relocate to the Cornwall countryside in order to be closer to their daughter and family. Away from the house hunt, Jules visits one of the oldest seal sanctuaries in the country.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The pranksters prove insensitive while conducting a sensitivity training class, have surprise celebrity encounters on the street and try being unreceptive receptionists in a busy office.

programme.title: The Simpsons Movie
programme.desc: After Homer pollutes the town's water supply, Springfield is encased in a gigantic dome by the EPA and the Simpsons are declared fugitives.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Rocky decides to stop living life online, and find love on a dating app, and Gumball and Darwin try to help him.

programme.title: MythBusters
programme.desc: Adam and Jamie take on new myths! Can an unsuspecting scuba diver be sucked out of the water by a fire fighting helicopter and end up in the middle of a forest fire? And do Hollywood's zany motor-myths and car capers live up to their urban legend status?
